name: workspace-health
description: Standard verification and repo-health checks for the monorepo.

interface.shortDescription: Runs and summarizes the repo's standard health checks.
interface.longDescription: Focuses on the monorepo verification commands such as typecheck, test, coverage, CI verification, and related repo-health summaries.
defaultPrompt: Run the standard repo health checks and summarize failures.
Tell me the smallest verification command for this change.
Explain which CI gate is failing and why.
